# Security policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest published template version is supported with security updates.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities privately via
[GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/mrrobot0985/devcontainer-templates/security/advisories/new)
instead of opening a public issue.

Include the following details:

- Affected template and version
- Steps to reproduce
- Possible impact
- Suggested fix or mitigation, if any

Maintainers will acknowledge receipt within 72 hours and aim to provide a
timeline for a fix within one week.

## Disclosure policy

Once a fix is released, the advisory will be published with credit to the
reporter unless they request anonymity.
